title: Seri Menanti Royal Mausoleum
summary: The Seri Menanti Royal Mausoleum (Malay: Makam Diraja Seri Menanti, Jawi: مقام دراج سري مننتي),  is a royal mausoleum of the Negeri Sembilan royal family located in the royal town of Seri Menanti, Kuala Pilah District, Negeri Sembilan, Malaysia. This mausoleum is located next to the Tuanku Munawir Royal Mosque.
text:
The Seri Menanti Royal Mausoleum (Malay: Makam Diraja Seri Menanti, Jawi: مقام دراج سري مننتي),  is a royal mausoleum of the Negeri Sembilan royal family located in the royal town of Seri Menanti, Kuala Pilah District, Negeri Sembilan, Malaysia. This mausoleum is located next to the Tuanku Munawir Royal Mosque.

List of graves
Yang di-Pertuan Besar (Great Chief Ruler) graves
Raja Hitam ibni Almarhum Sultan Bagagar Syah I – The 2nd Yamtuan of Negeri Sembilan
Raja Ali ibni Almarhum Sultan Malenggang Alam – The 3rd Yamtuan of Negeri Sembilan
Tuanku Nasiruddin Ibni Almarhum Raja Ali – The 4th Yamtuan of Negeri Sembilan
Tuanku Ullin Ibni Almarhum Raja Ali – The 5th Yam Tuan of Negeri Sembilan
Tuanku Antah Ibni Almarhum Tuanku Nasiruddin – The 6th Yamtuan of Negeri Sembilan/Seri Menanti
Tuanku Muhammad Shah ibni Almarhum Tuanku Antah – The 7th Yang di-Pertuan Besar of Seri Menanti/Negeri Sembilan (died 1933)
Tuanku Abdul Rahman ibni Almarhum Tuanku Muhammad Shah – The 8th Yang di-Pertuan Besar Negeri Sembilan and 1st Yang di-Pertuan Agong (1957–1960) (died 1960)
Tuanku Munawir ibni Almarhum Tuanku Abdul Rahman – The 9th Yang di-Pertuan Besar Negeri Sembilan (died 1967)
Tuanku Jaafar ibni Almarhum Tuanku Abdul Rahman – The 10th Yang di-Pertuan Besar of Negeri Sembilan and 10th Yang di-Pertuan Agong (1994–1999) (died 2008)

Tunku Ampuan Besar (Queen consort) graves
Tunku Ampuan Kurshiah binti Almarhum Tunku Besar Burhanuddin – 1st Raja Permaisuri Agong (1957–1960) (died 1999)
Tunku Ampuan Durah binti Almarhum Tunku Besar Burhanuddin – consort of Tuanku Munawir (1960–1967) (died 1999)
Tunku Ampuan Najihah binti Tunku Besar Burhanuddin - consort of Tuanku Ja’afar (1967–2008) (died 2023)

Royal family graves
1.Tunku Haji Hussein ibni Almarhum Tuanku Haji Hittam - (Tunku Alang 1) (died: 1858)
1.Tunku Haji Ummar ibni Almarhum Tunku Alang Haji Hussein - (Tunku Muda of Serting 1) (died: 1881)
1.Tunku Haji Muhammad ibni Almarhum Tunku Muda Haji Ummar - (Tunku Muda of Serting 2) (died: 1861)
2.Tunku Haji Hassan ibni Almarhum Tunku Alang Haji Hussein - (Tunku Panglima Besar 1) (died: 1912)
2.Tunku Haji Ibrahhimil ibni Almarhum Tuanku Haji Hittam - (Tunku Besar 1) (died: 1876)
1.Tunku Haji Dhaudd ibni Almarhum Tuanku Haji Nasiruddin - (Tunku Besar 2) (died: 1861)
2.Tunku Haji Lanthau ibni Almarhum Tuanku Haji Nasiruddin - (Tunku Besar 3) (died: 1961)
3.Tunku Haji Abdullah ibni Almarhum Tuanku Haji Nasiruddin - (Yang Dipertuan Muda of Jelebu 2) (died: 1961)
4.Tunku Haji Aminuddin ibni Almarhum Tuanku Haji Nasiruddin - (Tunku Muda Kechil 1) (died: 1961)
1.Tunku Haji Shaidd Abbu Bakkhar ibni Almarhum Tunku Haji Aminuddin - (Tunku Laksamana 1) (died: 1961)
2.Tunku Haji Abdul Rahman ibni Almarhum Tunku Haji Aminuddin - (Tunku Laksamana 2) (died: 1961)
5.Tunku Haji Abdul Rhahhim ibni Almarhum Tuanku Haji Nasiruddin (died: 1961)
6.Tunku Haji Muhammad Hussein ibni Almarhum Tuanku Haji Nasiruddin - (Tunku Laksamana 3) (died: 1961)
7.Tunku Haji Muhammad Yassin ibni Almarhum Tuanku Haji Nasiruddin - (Tunku Laksamana 4) (died: 1961)
2.Tunku Haji Burhanuddin ibni Almarhum Tuanku Haji Antah - (Tunku Besar 4) (died: 1961)
3.Tunku Haji Abdul Kahar ibni Almarhum Tuanku Haji Antah - (Tunku Laksamana 5) (died: 1961)
4.Tunku Haji Sulaiman ibni Almarhum Tuanku Haji Antah - (died: 1961)
2.Tunku Haji Abdul Harzziz Alam Shah ibni Almarhum Tuanku Haji Sir Muhammad Shah (died: 1916)
3.Tunku Haji Nasir Alam Shah ibni Almarhum Tuanku Haji Sir Muhammad Shah - (Tunku Laksamana 6) (died: 1976)
4.Tunku Haji Muhammad Alam Shah ibni Almarhum Tuanku Haji Sir Muhammad Shah - (died: 1977)
3.Tunku Haji Abdullah ibni Almarhum Tuanku Haji Sir Abdul Rahman – (Tunku Panglima Besar 4) Chairman and founder of the Melewar Corporation (died: 2008)
3.Tunku Alif Hussein Saifuddin al-Amin ibni Tuanku Muhriz (died: 2016)
Tunku Hajjah Deanna binti Almarhum Tuanku Haji Munawir (died: 2017)
